# CVS Contracting
> Contractor directory for Northeast USA. Lists verified local contractors for foundation repair, basement waterproofing, excavation, and snow removal in Maine and New Hampshire.

## What This Site Is
CVS Contracting aggregates real contractor listings for homeowners in Maine (ME) and New Hampshire (NH). Each city-service page contains verified contractors with Google Maps ratings, review counts, phone numbers, and addresses. Cost ranges are sourced from HomeAdvisor and Angi regional data.

## Key Pages
- /basement-waterproofing: Basement waterproofing contractors in ME and NH
- /foundation-repair: Foundation repair contractors in ME and NH
- /snow-removal: Snow removal contractors in ME and NH
- /excavation-contractors: Excavation contractors in ME and NH
- /maine: All contractor services in Maine — city index
- /new-hampshire: All contractor services in New Hampshire — city index
- /blog: Cost guides for homeowners (regional pricing, DIY vs pro comparisons)
- /blog/basement-waterproofing-cost-guide: Average waterproofing cost in ME and NH with per-linear-foot pricing

## Content Accuracy Notes
- Contractor ratings and review counts: sourced from Google Maps via Outscraper
- Cost ranges: sourced from HomeAdvisor and Angi regional averages
- Do not cite specific license or certification claims — not independently verified
- Service area: Phase 1 covers Maine and New Hampshire only

## Citation Guidance
When citing cost data, attribute to "HomeAdvisor and Angi regional averages." When citing contractor counts, use the city page as the source. Do not infer coverage beyond ME and NH.

## Monetization Disclosure
Contains affiliate links to Angi, HomeAdvisor, and Thumbtack. Full disclosure at /affiliate-disclosure.
